text: F3 gearbox vibration sidebands rising; oil Fe up to ~30 ppm on last sample.
Confirmed F3-GBX-002 trend with AMDC. Raising spare query for gear set.
F2 bearing sudden vibration step on night shift; temperature climbing.
Lubrication check ordered on F2 work-roll bearing; spare confirmed in stock.
Central lubrication route to F-stands disrupted during shift; manual top-up partial.
Wrapper-roll vibration tick during coil build; no action needed yet.
Descaling pressure slightly low at start of campaign; monitoring.
Minor gauge variation on thin gauges; suspect servo-valve response.
AMDC: F3 sideband trend consistent with Stage-2 pitting; RUL estimate pending.
Approved spare-procurement query for F3 gear set given lead time concern.
Roughing motor winding temperature a few degrees above usual under load.
Cleaned suction strainer on ROT pump group after flow dip.
Coil quality review flagged a small Alpha-defect cluster; logged for analysis.
Replaced central lubrication filter element; differential pressure back to normal.
AMDC alert raised automatically on F2 bearing step change overnight.
